en: Guidance: Ex.  Kabushiki Kaisha (KK), Goudou Kaisha (GK)
Please indicate your company’s business entity or form of business within this country
Please indicate the date your company was founded
Please indicate the date of Incorporation / registration (if applicable)
Is your company a member of the Japanese Chamber of Commerce (JCCI)?
If Yes, please enter your membership number\n

Help: The Corporate number is a 13-digit identifier assigned by the National Tax Agency. Guidance: https://www.houjin-bangou.nta.go.jp/ An Exclusion to the Corporate number requirement is if you are a Sole Proprietor
What is your company’s Japanese Corporate Number (JCN)?\n
Is your company subject to any export control, import control, or any other trade sanctions in any country?\n

Does your company comply with all the applicable laws and regulations in , including but not limited to laws and regulations on labor, export control, tax, environmental protection, IP, privacy, and data protection?
If not, please explain the circumstances of non-compliance.
Have any administrative sanctions or penalties been imposed on your company? Is your company involved in any ongoing litigation or dispute?
If so, please explain the reason for being sanctioned/the background and status of the litigation or dispute.\n
Are there any matters other than those listed above that would be of significant concern in conducting business with your company?
If so, please explain the details.\n
